# ML-DSA-65 signature-verification known-answer tests
#
# Source: NIST ACVP-Server (https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server),
#         file gen-val/json-files/ML-DSA-sigGen-FIPS204/internalProjection.json,
#         filtered to parameterSet = ML-DSA-65, deterministic = true,
#         preHash = pure, externalMu = false, context = empty.
#
# We use sigGen vectors (rather than sigVer) because sigVer empty-context
# coverage is equally thin and sigGen vectors are by construction valid
# (pass-only). Tampering / invalid-signature cases are exercised inline in
# tests::tampered_message_rejected and tests::tampered_signature_rejected.
#
# Tested by: crates/adamant-crypto/src/sig_pq.rs ::tests::nist_acvp_sig_ver_kats
#
# Format: blocks separated by blank lines.
#   tcId      = <upstream test-case id>
#   PK        = <1952-byte verifying key in hex>
#   Message   = <message bytes in hex>
#   Signature = <expected 3293-byte signature in hex>

[ParameterSet = ML-DSA-65]
[Context = empty]
[Deterministic = true]

tcId = 40
PK = 
Message = 
Signature =
